subject: [PATCH v5 18/21] memcg: swap: only charge physical swap slots

2026-03-20.patch_summary: This patch modifies the Linux kernel's memory cgroup (memcg) swap handling to only charge physical swap slots, rather than virtual swap slots. This change is made possible by the removal of zswap and zero-filled swap page optimization from consuming physical swap space. The patch updates various functions in the memcontrol code to record and clear swap charges for memcgs, ensuring that only actual physical swap usage is accounted for.
